title: micromeria canariensis subsp. meridialis
intro: Micromeria canariensis subsp. meridialis, also known as the Canary Islands hyssop, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Micromeria canariensis subsp. meridialis include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
